Properties.Description: Runs insurance audit sync every hour to calculate commissions
Runs insurance note copier every hour to sync plan notes

Properties.AlarmDescription: Alert when insurance-audit-sync Lambda has errors
Alert when insurance-audit-sync Lambda is throttled
Alert when insurance-doc-processor Lambda has errors
Alert when insurance-doc-processor Lambda is throttled
Alert when insurance-note-copier Lambda has errors
Alert when insurance-note-copier Lambda is throttled
Alert when insurance-commission-api Lambda has errors
Alert when insurance-commission-api Lambda is throttled

CommissionsTableName.Description: Name of the Insurance Commissions DynamoDB table

ConfigTableName.Description: Name of the Insurance Automation Config DynamoDB table

AuditLogsTableName.Description: Name of the Insurance Audit Logs DynamoDB table

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
